bullets: Operator supplied a FRED key (local-only: data/secrets/fred.key; FRED wants the key as a URL param so logged sources are key-stripped by construction, and publish.py blocklists the key value at render).

Fed lane per registrations/2026-07-19_economy_macro_v0.2.md: FOMC rate-decision markets scored from the bill-implied path (DTB3 vs target midpoint, coded premium/sigma, coded 2026 FOMC calendar); cut/hike/hold + 25/50bp; held-meeting and QT/personnel markets abstain; rates questions that never name the Fed abstain (could be any central bank). CPI lane unchanged; tag bumped to v0.2 (version- bump re-scores). Conf hard 0.50 unchanged. Macro self-cap 10 -> 15 calls/day (BLS + FRED shared).
changelog.title: v0.9.1 — 2026-07-19 (economy-macro v0.2 — Fed lane unlocked)

bullets: Sports research engine v0.1 LIVE, scorecard-only (sports_research.py, registrations/2026-07-19_sports_v0.1.md): de-vigged sportsbook consensus (per-book normalization, median across ≥3 books) vs the Polymarket price on same-game moneylines; baseball/basketball/soccer; named binaries + Yes/No; conf hard 0.40. Probe frozen: odds post near game day; per-sport 50-call/day budgets (each API-Sports host has its own 100/day free quota); date+game queries work on free, league/season listings don't. NFL/NHL deferred (off-season) as spec addendum.

Economy macro research engine v0.1 LIVE, scorecard-only (economy_research.py, registrations/2026-07-19_economy_macro_v0.1.md): CPI threshold markets from keyless BLS public API (MoM nowcast / YoY carry model, coded sigmas), conf hard 0.50. Fed markets ABSTAIN — frozen: no honest free source (FedWatch ToS, FRED needs key signup).
Politics v0.1.2 confirmed landed with its 14:43Z re-run (15 scored, 12 none_of_these abstains — the fix behaving as registered).

Research lanes isolated in --daily: one lane's crash can't silence the rest. Sandbox #1 (Tier 1, zero authority): UFCStats-derived dated per-bout sources mapped for a future combat v0.2 calibration; parked.
ETH untouched — stays abstaining until the August crypto verdict.
changelog.title: v0.9 — 2026-07-19 (full build-out — every lane scoring)

bullets: Combat research engine v0.1 wired into --daily (combat_research.py), per registrations/2026-07-19_combat_v0.1.md: API-Sports MMA as the structured source (operator decision; free plan, key local-only in data/secrets/, NEVER in repo or dashboard), fight-WINNER markets only, five mandatory abstain-tripwire steps (entity resolution, bout confirmation w/ cancellation check, ≥5-fight records, GDELT injury tripwire, coded career-record logistic k=6). Confidence hard 0.40 (cannot fire); every score -> scored_history.jsonl.
Free-plan probe logged: /fights per-fighter blocked past 2024 — v0.1's signal is career records, not recent form; that limitation is frozen into the registration (a better source = v0.2 redesign).

Spend: self-imposed 50 API calls/day of the 100/day plan; caches (fighters 30d, records 7d, cards 12h) + quota ledger + churn skip (re-score only on ≥5¢ move or 20h). Run stats -> research_costs.jsonl.
changelog.title: v0.8 — 2026-07-19 (Track D combat lane LIVE, scorecard-only)

bullets: Gate 3 merged to master; forward-calibration join wired into --daily; funnel line (fetched->in-scope->routed->scored->cleared->fired) printed every cycle.
ntfy notifications (topic in atlas.yaml): every FIRE (high priority) + every daily-run failure (urgent; python-level via notify.py, shell-level via daily_run.sh curl).

Track D politics research engine v0.1 LIVE, scorecard-only: breadth pre-filter (all in-domain, <=14d, soonest-first), GDELT AP/Reuters dated headlines, LLM (claude CLI haiku) for synthesis ONLY — strict JSON factors/class/adjustment-categories; ALL probability math in code (coded base-rate menu, +/-.04/.08 adjustments, net cap .15, clamp [.05,.95]); conf hard 0.40 (cannot fire). Hard cap 40 LLM calls/run; per-run cost logged to data/research_costs.jsonl; month-to-date spend + scored/day + checkpoint ETAs on the scoreboard. Combat stays gated on Track C.
Economy: per the diagnostic, nothing moves; AAPL/NVDA watch-don't-trust.
changelog.title: v0.7 — 2026-07-18 (Gate 3 approved — full execution)

engines.name: crypto
engines.note: v0.3: barrier/terminal price model on exchange daily closes, per-kind Platt recalibration frozen 2026-07-18. ETH-USD abstains — v0.2 was right on only 40% of ETH disagreements and the cause is unknown.

engines.name: economy
engines.note: v0.2 (can fire): “largest company by market cap” races from SEC EDGAR shares + price history. Plus a macro research lane (scorecard-only, confidence capped 0.50): CPI threshold markets from official BLS data, and Fed rate-decision markets from the bill-implied path (FRED official data).

engines.name: sports
engines.note: Research engine v0.1 (scorecard-only): de-vigged sportsbook consensus (median across ≥3 books) vs the Polymarket price on same-game moneylines in baseball, basketball and soccer. Confidence hard-capped at 0.40, below the 0.60 firing bar; props and futures abstain. Forward checkpoints n=30/50, verdict n≥100.

engines.name: combat
engines.note: Research engine v0.1 (scorecard-only): career-record model on API-Sports MMA data with entity, bout-status and injury abstain tripwires. Confidence hard-capped at 0.40, below the 0.60 firing bar — it builds a forward record toward n=30/50 checkpoints, verdict n≥100.

engines.name: politics
engines.note: Research engine v0.1.2 (scorecard-only): dated AP/Reuters headlines, coded base-rate menu, LLM for synthesis only — no model number comes from the LLM. Confidence hard-capped at 0.40, below the 0.65 firing bar; forward checkpoints n=30/50, verdict n≥100.

stages.label: inside 20–80¢ band, live book
stages.why: price outside band, thin book, no two-sided quotes, non-Yes/No outcomes, or past scheduled end

stages.label: routed to an engine
stages.why: no domain match — unrouted markets are skipped by design

stages.label: scored (engine gave a probability)
stages.why: engine abstained: out of scope, ambiguous wording, or no trustworthy data source

stages.label: cleared the confidence bar
stages.why: engine confidence below the per-domain firing bar (crypto 0.65, economy 0.60)

stages.label: cleared the 2× cost hurdle
stages.why: edge vs the live book smaller than 2× modeled costs (fees + slippage + half-spread)

open_positions.question: Will Bitcoin dip to $45,000 by December 31, 2026?

all.assumptions: In-sample evidence in live clothing: the v0.3 calibration was FIT on these rows, order books were not archived (2¢ spread assumed, base-band costs charged), and resolution timing is approximated by each market's horizon. The pre-registered holdout — not this replay — decides v0.3. Rules as deployed: ETH excluded, confidence ≥ 0.65, edge ≥ 2.0× costs, 1 pick per cluster, max 10 open, 1% compounding from $5,000.

scored_table.question: Will XRP reach $1.20 in July?
scored_table.rationale: XRP-USD: spot 1.10, barrier 1 (touch up), 12.0d horizon, realized daily vol 2.21% (n=95 closes) -> driftless touch prob raw 24.4%, v0.3-calibrated 27.4% (1.16 sigma).

scored_table.question: Will Apple be the largest company in the world by market cap on December 31?
scored_table.rationale: AAPL cap $4.90T (shares as of 2026-04-17) vs top rival NVDA $4.91T -> log gap -0.001; ratio vol 3.18%/d over 61d, horizon 164d -> P(largest at end date)=49.9% (terminal, driftless; 'by/on' treated as end-date snapshot). Field checked: NVDA/AAPL/MSFT.

scored_table.question: Iran military action against a Gulf State on July 20?
scored_table.rationale: [research-politics-v0.1.2] class=escalation_event_by_deadline yes=event_occurs base=0.20 net_adj=-0.15 -> p=0.05. YES: Ongoing Iran-Gulf State regional tensions; Historical pattern of Iranian military escalations in response to perceived threats | NO: No recent escalation incidents reported in available headlines; Extremely compressed 24-hour window makes unprovoked military action unlikely; Lack of immediate triggering events or acute provocations in last 7 days | 0 headlines (AP/Reuters, 7d).
